Class mysqlParser.Tokens_available_for_namesContext

java.lang.Object
org.antlr.v4.runtime.RuleContext
org.antlr.v4.runtime.ParserRuleContext
com.zendesk.maxwell.schema.ddl.mysqlParser.Tokens_available_for_namesContext
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.antlr.v4.runtime.tree.ParseTree, org.antlr.v4.runtime.tree.RuleNode, org.antlr.v4.runtime.tree.SyntaxTree, org.antlr.v4.runtime.tree.Tree
Enclosing class:
mysqlParser
public static class mysqlParser.Tokens_available_for_namesContext extends org.antlr.v4.runtime.ParserRuleContext
